description: Marius from Hubble Protocol discusses the challenges of building a stablecoin on Solana, including scaling issues and constraints related to account models and compute budgets. He shares insights from his experience transitioning from traditional finance to DeFi, emphasizing the importance of addressing complexities as user numbers grow.
topic_summary: Marius outlines the journey of developing a stablecoin on Solana, focusing on scaling challenges and technical constraints encountered during the process. He highlights the need for innovative solutions to accommodate a growing user base while maintaining system integrity.
